chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-433 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 20.05.2025 Mr. Mushtaq Ali Langah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, D.A.G. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Malik, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 4 alongwith attorney of the respondents. ------ At the very outset, learned counsel for the respondents submits that the petitioner has already been awarded promotion. As far as his remaining prayer is concerned, he may be directed to approach the department by filing his representation or to file suit as the case may be. He further submits that the respondents are statutory body and the petition against such body is not maintainable; hence seeks its disposal. Learned D.A.G has no objection. Counsel for the petitioner when confronted has no objection for disposal of the petition; however, submits that the petitioner may be allowed to avail remedy according to law before the respondents, that too is not opposed by the other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
